diagnostics_export.path_policy: basename metadata only; UI must not open, read, parse, upload, or tail the artifact

status.labeling_requirement: Displayed data must be labeled as status packet summary, not diagnostics output.

may_populate: bounded recovery or attestation fields already present in command packet
healthcheck.labeling_requirement: Displayed data must be labeled as healthcheck packet summary, not diagnostics output.

required_before_live_use: no direct file/log/state reads by UI
tests proving no raw private material leaks

may_populate: history chart placeholder in fixture/demo mode
latest records placeholder in fixture/demo mode
fixture_demo.labeling_requirement: Fixture/demo content must not be described as observed runtime data.

allowed: structured payload fields admitted by existing actions

required: support-artifact metadata is distinct from runtime packet truth
runtime summary source is labeled when present
live history is deferred when no bounded command packet exists
fixture data is not observed runtime data
forbidden: diagnostics export is treated as a runtime-health proof
history is observed without packet proof
latest records come from raw logs
artifact was opened or inspected by UI

admitted_without_new_backend: separately labeled runtime summary from existing readonly packets
requires_separate_future_contour: artifact opening or export browser flow

resume_from_here: Run independent audit, closeout, final scans, commit, and push.
